name: Hog Jowls and Turnip Greens Southern Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from turnip greens and chop leaves.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add mustard seeds and stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add chopped greens to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until wilted.
4. Season the greens with red pepper flakes and salt to taste.
5. Trim excess fat from smoked hog jowl and cut into serving-sized portions.
6. Cook the hog jowls in a separate skillet over medium heat until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Place meat in the center of a platter with poached eggs arranged around it.
8. Serve cornbread alongside.
